//: Self-contained — deliberately does NOT extend ../../tsconfig.base.json. The base config carries `@hope-ui/* -> packages/*/src` paths (the 'always resolve to src in dev' invariant); inheriting them here would defeat the 'dist for build' decision, since `tsc --noEmit` (run inside `build`) must type against the published dist `.d.ts` a real consumer sees, resolved via node_modules -> package `exports`.
